hero.tagline: A celebration of love across cultures
welcome.title: Dear Friends & Family
welcome.body: We are so happy and excited to invite you to celebrate our wedding with us! What started as a chance meeting has grown into a love that bridges two cultures, two countries, and two families. Nothing would mean more to us than having you there as we begin this new chapter together. Get ready for a weekend filled with color, traditions, dancing, great food, and lots of love!
venue.title: Venue
venue.name: Wiks Slott
venue.description: Join us at this beautiful castle outside Uppsala for our special day.
schedule.title: Schedule
schedule.day1.title: Haldi & Mehendi
schedule.day2.title: Wedding Day
schedule.mehendi.title: Haldi & Mehendi
schedule.mehendi.description: Join us for an afternoon of turmeric blessings, henna art, music, and celebration
schedule.mehendi.explanation: Haldi is a joyful pre-wedding ritual where turmeric paste is applied to the couple's skin as a blessing for purification, good luck, and a natural glow. Mehendi is the art of applying intricate henna designs to the bride's hands and feet, symbolizing love, joy, and good fortune. Both are celebrated with music, dancing, and togetherness — guests are welcome to join in!
schedule.ceremony.title: Ceremony
schedule.ceremony.explanation: Our ceremony blends Indian and Swedish traditions. You may see elements like the exchange of garlands (Jaimala), circling the sacred fire (Pheras), and the tying of the Mangalsutra — each symbolizing love, commitment, and unity. Don't worry, we'll guide you through everything on the day!
